This approach departs from the traditional route of incorporating increasingly expensive hand-designed non-local features from Jacob\'s ladder into functional forms to improve their accuracy. links.title: Safety Training Modulates Harmful Misalignment Under On-Policy RL, But Direction Depends on Environment Design

primary_link.title: Safety Training Modulates Harmful Misalignment Under On-Policy RL, But Direction Depends on Environment Design

papers.summary: Specification gaming under Reinforcement Learning (RL) is known to cause LLMs to develop sycophantic, manipulative, or deceptive behavior, yet the conditions under which this occurs remain unclear. We train 11 instruction-tuned LLMs (0.5B--14B) with on-policy RL across 3 environments and find that model size acts as a safety buffer in some environments but enables greater harmful exploitation in others. Controlled ablations trace this reversal to environment-specific features such as role framin
papers.summary_zh: Reinforcement Learning (RL) 下的「規範鑽營」(specification gaming) 已知會導致 LLM 產生奉承、操縱或欺騙行為，然而這種情況發生的條件仍不清楚。我們在三個環境中，使用 on-policy RL 訓練了 11 個 instruction-tuned LLM (0.5B--14B)，發現模型大小在某些環境中可作為安全緩衝，但在其他環境中卻助長了更大的有害利用。受控的消融實驗將這種逆轉歸因於環境特定的特徵，例如角色框架 (role framing)。
papers.title: Safety Training Modulates Harmful Misalignment Under On-Policy RL, But Direction Depends on Environment Design
papers.title_zh: 安全訓練在 On-Policy RL 下調節有害失準，但方向取決於環境設計

links.title: Audio-Cogito: Towards Deep Audio Reasoning in Large Audio Language Models

primary_link.title: Audio-Cogito: Towards Deep Audio Reasoning in Large Audio Language Models

papers.summary: Recent advances in reasoning models have driven significant progress in text and multimodal domains, yet audio reasoning remains relatively limited. Only a few Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) incorporate explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, and their capabilities are often inconsistent and insufficient for complex tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce Audio-Cogito, a fully open-source solution for deep audio reasoning. We develop Cogito-pipe for high-quality audio reasoning data cura
papers.summary_zh: 推理模型在文字和多模態領域取得了顯著進展，然而音訊推理仍相對有限。只有少數 Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) 整合了明確的 Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理，且其能力對於複雜任務來說通常不一致且不足。為彌補這一差距，我們引入了 Audio-Cogito，一個用於深度音訊推理的完全開源解決方案。我們開發了 Cogito-pipe 以進行高品質的音訊推理數據策劃 (curation)。
papers.title: Audio-Cogito: Towards Deep Audio Reasoning in Large Audio Language Models
papers.title_zh: Audio-Cogito：邁向大型音訊語言模型中的深度音訊推理

links.title: Drawing on Memory: Dual-Trace Encoding Improves Cross-Session Recall in LLM Agents

primary_link.title: Drawing on Memory: Dual-Trace Encoding Improves Cross-Session Recall in LLM Agents

papers.summary: LLM agents with persistent memory store information as flat factual records, providing little context for temporal reasoning, change tracking, or cross-session aggregation. Inspired by the drawing effect [3], we introduce dual-trace memory encoding. In this method, each stored fact is paired with a concrete scene trace, a narrative reconstruction of the moment and context in which the information was learned. The agent is forced to commit to specific contextual details during encoding, creating
papers.summary_zh: 具有持久記憶的 LLM 代理將資訊儲存為扁平的事實記錄，為時間推理、變更追蹤或跨會話聚合提供的上下文甚少。受 drawing effect [3] 的啟發，我們引入了雙軌跡記憶編碼 (dual-trace memory encoding)。在此方法中，每個儲存的事實都與一個具體的場景軌跡配對，這是一個關於資訊學習時的時刻和上下文的敘事性重建。代理在編碼過程中被迫提交特定的上下文細節，從而創造出更豐富的記憶表示。
papers.title: Drawing on Memory: Dual-Trace Encoding Improves Cross-Session Recall in LLM Agents
papers.title_zh: 憑藉記憶：雙軌跡編碼提高 LLM 代理的跨會話回憶能力

links.title: Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models

primary_link.title: Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models

papers.summary: Traditional fixed-depth architectures scale quality by increasing training FLOPs, typically through increased parameterization, at the expense of a higher memory footprint, or data. A potential alternative is looped architectures, which instead increase FLOPs by sending activations through a block of layers in a loop. While promising, existing recipes for training looped architectures can be unstable, suffering from residual explosion and loss spikes. We address these challenges by recasting loo
papers.summary_zh: 傳統的固定深度架構透過增加訓練 FLOPs 來提升品質，通常是透過增加參數化來實現，但代價是更高的記憶體佔用或數據量。一種潛在的替代方案是循環架構 (looped architectures)，它透過讓 activations 在一組層中循環傳遞來增加 FLOPs。儘管很有前景，但現有的循環架構訓練方法可能不穩定，會出現殘差爆炸 (residual explosion) 和損失峰值 (loss spikes) 的問題。我們透過重新構思循環訓練方法來解決這些挑戰。
papers.title: Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models
papers.title_zh: Parcae：穩定循環語言模型的擴展定律

primary_link.title: BEAM: Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution for LLM-Powered Heuristic Design

papers.summary: Large Language Model-based Hyper Heuristic (LHH) has recently emerged as an efficient way for automatic heuristic design. However, most existing LHHs just perform well in optimizing a single function within a pre-defined solver. Their single-layer evolution makes them not effective enough to write a competent complete solver. While some variants incorporate hyperparameter tuning or attempt to generate complex code through iterative local modifications, they still lack a high-level algorithmic mo
papers.summary_zh: 基於大型語言模型的超啟發式 (Large Language Model-based Hyper Heuristic, LHH) 近來已成為自動啟發式設計的一種高效方法。然而，大多數現有的 LHH 僅在預定義求解器中優化單一功能時表現良好。它們的單層演化使得它們不足以編寫一個稱職的完整求解器。儘管一些變體結合了超參數調整或嘗試透過迭代局部修改生成複雜程式碼，但它們仍然缺乏高層次的演算法設計。
papers.title: BEAM: Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution for LLM-Powered Heuristic Design

links.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance

primary_link.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance

papers.summary: RLVR improves reasoning in large language models, but its effectiveness is often limited by severe reward sparsity on hard problems. Recent hint-based RL methods mitigate sparsity by injecting partial solutions or abstract templates, yet they typically scale guidance by adding more tokens, which introduce redundancy, inconsistency, and extra training overhead. We propose \textbf{KnowRL} (Knowledge-Guided Reinforcement Learning), an RL training framework that treats hint design as a minimal-suffi
papers.summary_zh: RLVR 改善了大型語言模型中的推理能力，但其有效性常因困難問題上的嚴重獎勵稀疏性而受限。最近基於提示詞 (hint) 的 RL 方法通過注入部分解決方案或抽象模板來緩解稀疏性，然而，它們通常通過增加更多 token 來擴展引導，這會引入冗餘、不一致性和額外的訓練開銷。我們提出了 KnowRL (Knowledge-Guided Reinforcement Learning)，這是一個將提示詞設計視為最小充分的 RL 訓練框架
papers.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance

links.title: CIA: Inferring the Communication Topology from LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems

primary_link.title: CIA: Inferring the Communication Topology from LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems

papers.summary: LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex tasks. papers.summary: Realizing endogenous narrative evolution in LLM-based multi-agent systems is hindered by the inherent stochasticity of generative emergence. papers.summary: This paper addresses two limitations of large language models (LLMs) in solving complex problems: (1) their reasoning processes exhibit Bayesian-like stochastic generation, where each token is sampled from a context-dependent probability distribution, leading to inherently random decision trajectories rather than deterministic planning; (2) the reasoning and decision-making mechanisms are statically decoupled, meaning dynamically retrieved domain knowledge fails to dynamically adjust the underly

papers.summary: We introduce HypoExplore, an agentic framework that formulates neural architecture discovery for visual recognition as a hypothesis-driven scientific inquiry. papers.summary_zh: 我們介紹了 HypoExplore，這是一個具代理性的框架，將用於視覺識別的神經架構探索建構為一種假設驅動的科學探究。在給定人類指定的高層次研究方向後，HypoExplore 透過演化分支來構思、實施、評估並改進神經架構。新的假設是透過大型語言模型創建的，方式是選擇一個父假設作為基礎，並由一種平衡利用已驗證原則的雙重策略所引導。

links.title: ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL

primary_link.title: ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL

papers.summary: Execution Accuracy (EX), the widely used metric for evaluating the effectiveness of Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) solutions, is becoming increasingly unreliable. papers.title: ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL
papers.title_zh: ROSE：一種以意圖為中心的 NL2SQL 評估指標

primary_link.title: Calibrated Confidence Estimation for Tabular Question Answering

radar.summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for tabular question
  answering, yet calibration on structured data is largely unstudied. This
  paper presents the first systematic comparison of five confidence estimation
  methods across five frontier LLMs and two tabular QA benchmarks. All models
  are severely overconfident (smooth ECE 0.35-0.64 versus 0.10-0.15 reported
  for textual QA). A consistent self-evaluation versus perturbation dichotomy
  replicates across both benchmarks a
radar.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 越來越多地部署於 tabular question answering 任務，然而，在結構化資料上的 calibration 卻鮮有研究。本文首次系統性地比較了五種 confidence estimation 方法，涉及五個領先的 LLMs 和兩個 tabular QA benchmarks。所有模型都表現出嚴重的 overconfident（平滑 ECE 為 0.35-0.64，而 textual QA 報告的為 0.10-0.15）。一個一致的 self-evaluation 與 perturbation 之間的二分法在兩個 benchmarks 上均得以重現。
radar.title: Calibrated Confidence Estimation for Tabular Question Answering

links.title: MultiDocFusion: Hierarchical and Multimodal Chunking Pipeline for Enhanced RAG on Long Industrial Documents

primary_link.title: MultiDocFusion: Hierarchical and Multimodal Chunking Pipeline for Enhanced RAG on Long Industrial Documents

radar.summary: RAG-based QA has emerged as a powerful method for processing long industrial documents. However, conventional text chunking approaches often neglect complex and long industrial document structures, causing information loss and reduced answer quality. radar.summary_zh: 基於 RAG 的 QA 已成為處理長篇工業文件的強大方法。然而，傳統的 text chunking 方法往往忽略複雜且冗長的工業文件結構，導致資訊損失和答案品質下降。為了解決此問題，我們引入了 MultiDocFusion，這是一個多模態 chunking pipeline，它整合了：(i) 使用 vision-based document parsing 進行文件區域檢測，(ii) 透過 OCR 從這些區域提取文本，(iii) 文件結構的重建

links.title: Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now Generally Available

primary_link.title: Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now Generally Available

radar.summary: With the new Spring AI AgentCore SDK, you can build production-ready AI agents and run them on the highly scalable AgentCore Runtime. The Spring AI AgentCore SDK is an open source library that brings Amazon Bedrock AgentCore capabilities into Spring AI. In this post, we build an AI agent starting with a chat endpoint, then adding streaming responses, conversation memory, and tools for web browsing and code execution.
radar.title: Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now Generally Available

links.title: Best practices to run inference on Amazon SageMaker HyperPod

primary_link.title: Best practices to run inference on Amazon SageMaker HyperPod

radar.summary: This post explores how Amazon SageMaker HyperPod provides a comprehensive solution for inference workloads. We walk you through the platform’s key capabilities for dynamic scaling, simplified deployment, and intelligent resource management. By the end of this post, you’ll understand how to use the HyperPod automated infrastructure, cost optimization features, and performance enhancements to reduce your total cost of ownership by up to 40% while accelerating your generative AI deployments from concept to production.
radar.title: Best practices to run inference on Amazon SageMaker HyperPod

links.title: Use-case based deployments on SageMaker JumpStart

primary_link.title: Use-case based deployments on SageMaker JumpStart

radar.summary: We're excited to announce the launch of Amazon SageMaker JumpStart optimized deployments. SageMaker JumpStart improved deployments address the need for rich and straightforward deployment customization on SageMaker JumpStart by offering pre-defined deployment configurations, designed for specific use cases. Customers maintain the same level of visibility into the details of their proposed deployments, but now deployments are optimized for their specific use case and performance constraint.
radar.title: Use-case based deployments on SageMaker JumpStart

links.title: Can Persona-Prompted LLMs Emulate Subgroup Values? An Empirical Analysis of Generalisability and Fairness in Cultural Alignment

primary_link.title: Can Persona-Prompted LLMs Emulate Subgroup Values? An Empirical Analysis of Generalisability and Fairness in Cultural Alignment

top5.summary: Despite their global prevalence, many Large Language Models (LLMs) are aligned to a monolithic, often Western-centric set of values. This paper investigates the more challenging task of fine-grained value alignment: examining whether LLMs can emulate the distinct cultural values of demographic subgroups.
